task1.title: Bar Chart: Car Ownership by Household in a European Country
task1.prompt:
The chart below shows changes in car ownership by households in one European country between 1971 and 2001.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task2.title: Opinion: Children Should Try Hard to Achieve Success
task2.prompt:
In some cultures, children are often told that they can achieve anything if they try hard enough.

What are the advantages and disadvantages of giving children this message?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
